_note: Synced Texas de Brazil dinner schedule. The Hub card writes the dinner date/time into ~/recruiting-report/output/texas_de_brazil_manual.json on whatever machine runs the Hub, but the report runs on the mini (Lucy 1) and reads its OWN local copy — so a date typed on the laptop never reached the mini's 8AM run (flyer showed 'TO BE DETERMINED'). This git-tracked seed carries the schedule across machines: tdb_sync_inputs.py merges it into the run machine's local JSON before each run. Keys are the COMPETITION month 'YYYY-MM' (load_dinner reads the current period). Leaders are NOT stored here — those live in the deployed cell's *_BY_MONTH dicts / new_leaders_text and are left untouched.
